description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a sleek, rectangular form and rounded corners, featuring a large, edge-to-edge touchscreen display on the front. The display shows a vibrant, space-themed wallpaper with several app icons, widgets, and a status bar at the top. The back of the phone is a smooth, light purple surface with a subtle logo in the center and a dual-camera module positioned in the top left corner, accompanied by a small flash. The sides of the phone are thin and metallic, with minimal visible buttons or interruptions, emphasizing its slim profile. The overall design is minimalist and premium, typical of high-end consumer electronics. The phone appears to be constructed from a combination of glass and metal, with precise detailing and a glossy finish.
description: A sleek, light purple smartphone with a large touchscreen display, dual rear cameras, and a minimalist, premium design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the illuminated touchscreen with app icons, widgets, and a space-themed wallpaper.
description_view_1: Side profile revealing the phone's slim, metallic edge with no visible buttons.
description_view_2: Back view displaying a smooth, light purple surface, a centered logo, and a dual-camera module in the top left corner.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again showing the thin metallic edge with minimal visible features.
attribute_brand_logo: A subtle, light-colored logo is centered on the back of the phone, likely representing the brand, but the exact design is not clearly visible.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a space-themed wallpaper with several app icons, including Settings, App Store, Safari, Messages, Discord, Twitter, Snapchat, Photos, and Music, as well as widgets and a status bar showing the time and signal indicators.
attribute_camera_placement: There are two camera lenses and a flash arranged in a vertical line in the top left corner on the back of the phone.
attribute_button_layout: No physical buttons are clearly visible in the provided views, suggesting a minimal or hidden button design.
